
<h1 style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Meet the Team</h1>

::: {.people-row}

::: {.person-card}
<img src="images/Kotikot.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Team Member">

### Dr. Susan Kotikot
Principal Investigator

::: {.person-social-links}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/susankotikot/" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
:::
:::



::: {.people-row}

::: {.person-card}
<img src="images/Kotikot.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Team Member">

### Dr. Donald Akanga
Principal Investigator2

::: {.person-social-links}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/susankotikot/" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
:::
:::




::: {.people-row}

::: {.person-card}
<img src="images/Kotikot.jpg" class="profile-img" alt="Team Member">

### Dr. Dan Wanyama
Principal Investigator3

::: {.person-social-links}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/susankotikot/" target="_blank"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin-in"></i></a>
:::
:::



:::
